data.question: How long does it take to receive my order?
data.answer: Delivery usually takes 1-2 working days within the city and 3-5 working days for nationwide orders. For international shipments, delivery may take 7-14 days, depending on location and courier service.

data.question: What payment methods do you accept?
data.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers. All transactions are secure and encrypted.

data.question: Do you offer returns or exchanges?
data.answer: Yes! You can return or exchange any item within 30 days of delivery. The product must be unused and in original packaging.

data.question: Is there a warranty on products?
data.answer: All products come with a minimum 1-year warranty. Extended warranty options are available at checkout.

data.question: How can I track my order?
data.answer: Once your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking link via email and SMS. You can also track it directly from your account dashboard.
